'''Emperor''' may refer to:

* [[Naru Huan]] — Emperor of the Blackflame Empire (''Cradle'')
* [[Emperor (Elder Empire)]] — the immortal Emperor of the Aurelian Empire (''The Elder Empire'')

;See also
* [[Rosegold Emperor]] — a historical emperor of Cradle
* [[false Emperor]] — the impostor of the Elder Empire

''This disambiguation page separates different subjects that share a name across the Willverse's series.''

[[Category:Disambiguation]]
